command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
-- Check bookings (operational module)
SELECT id, bookingNumber, clientName, scheduledDate, numberOfPersons, totalAmount, status, reservationId, sourceChannel
FROM bookings WHERE clientName LIKE '%Rata%' OR clientEmail = 'jgrande@skicenter.es';

-- Check REAV expedients
SELECT id, expedientNumber, clientName, serviceDescription, saleAmountTotal, status, invoiceId, reservationId, createdAt
FROM reav_expedients WHERE clientName LIKE '%Rata%' OR clientEmail = 'jgrande@skicenter.es';
